memories.content: User was diagnosed with asthma as a baby
User had chronic asthma diagnosed as a baby.
User has been diagnosed with ADHD
User has been diagnosed with cPTSD
User has been diagnosed with OCPD
User has been diagnosed with alcohol use disorder
User has been diagnosed with generalized anxiety disorder
User has been diagnosed with depression
User has been diagnosed with PTSD related to their experiences in the military.
User prefers ADHD-friendly communication style.
Pauline is a key part of the user's recovery and mental health monitoring and maintenance.
User is medically retired due to mental health
User was medically retired due to mental health.
He was medically retired due to PTSD and mental health impacts.

User identifies small positive actions, such as rest, hydration, support meetings, exercise, grounding, safe conversations, structured routines, emotional validation, healthy connection, and meaningful purpose as essential for recovery.

User believes emotional safety, meaningful connection, purpose, stability, regulation, growth, belonging, self-understanding, healthy routines, and supportive relationships are important for well-being.

User understands that sustainable human flourishing often occurs through small consistent improvements, healthy support systems, emotional regulation, safe environments, recovery pathways, meaningful goals, and compassionate self-awareness.
User understands that recovery is part of healthy functioning rather than failure.
User aims to help others build sustainable, emotionally healthy, long-term progress.
User finds it hard to get things done around the house due to mental health.
User is in the process of identifying the root causes of their mental health issues.
User had chronic asthma until age 7
User was frequently hospitalized as a baby due to chronic asthma, with hospitalizations occurring 1 week out of every 4 weeks.
User's chronic asthma condition lasted until age 7.
User was frequently hospitalized due to chronic asthma until age 7.
User had near-death experiences during hospital stays as a baby due to asthma.
I am medically retired and no longer work, but have spent a lot of time building programs on my computer.
User has ADHD and processes information better with structured communication.
User is getting better at managing anxiety by slowing down and focusing on breathing.
User thinks many people carry unnecessary shame due to a lack of understanding their nervous system, trauma responses, emotional patterns, ADHD traits, or coping mechanisms.
User recognizes the impact of trauma and ADHD patterns on interpretation of reality.
User is interested in understanding ADHD and how structure affects cognitive load and emotional regulation.
User likely experiences overwhelm and challenges with prioritization and filtering information due to ADHD.
User has an interest in learning about ADHD and its effects on perception and reality.
User is aware of the connection between ADHD, trauma, and cognitive processes.
Worked in own planning business until medically retired in December 2023
User has OCD caused by OCPD and complex PTSD.
User experiences overlapping symptoms from various conditions, including ADHD.
